list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT u.name as __text, u.name as __value FROM user u JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' ORDER BY u.name
list.label: User
list.name: user_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT u.name as __text, u.name as __value FROM user u JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' ORDER BY u.name

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id as __text, model_id as __value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_id as __text, model_id as __value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY model_id

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM chat WHERE archived = 0
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM chat WHERE archived = 0

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant'
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant'

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM chat WHERE created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days')
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM chat WHERE created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days')

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM chat WHERE created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days')
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM chat WHERE created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days')

targets.queryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, COUNT(*) as "Chats" FROM chat WHERE created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400 ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, COUNT(*) as "Chats" FROM chat WHERE created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400 ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, COUNT(*) as "Messages" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400 ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, COUNT(*) as "Messages" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400 ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Messages" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id != '' GROUP BY model_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Messages" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id != '' GROUP BY model_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Messages" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id != '' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days') GROUP BY model_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Messages" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id != '' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days') GROUP BY model_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

targets.queryText: SELECT u.name as "Name", u.email as "Email", u.role as "Role", u.last_active_at * 1000 as "Last Active", u.created_at * 1000 as "Registered", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat c WHERE c.user_id = u.id AND c.archived = 0) as "Chats", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.user_id = u.id AND cm.role = 'assistant') as "AI Messages" FROM user u ORDER BY u.last_active_at DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT u.name as "Name", u.email as "Email", u.role as "Role", u.last_active_at * 1000 as "Last Active", u.created_at * 1000 as "Registered", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat c WHERE c.user_id = u.id AND c.archived = 0) as "Chats", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.user_id = u.id AND cm.role = 'assistant') as "AI Messages" FROM user u ORDER BY u.last_active_at DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null'
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null'

targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null'
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null'

targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.total_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null'
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.total_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null'

targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.total_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days')
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.total_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-30 days')

targets.queryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as "Input", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as "Output" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400 ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as "Input", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as "Output" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400 ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, model_id as metric, AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND model_id IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400, model_id ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, model_id as metric, AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END) as value FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND model_id IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY created_at / 86400, model_id ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Responses", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as "Input Tokens", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as "Output Tokens", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.total_tokens')) as "Total Tokens", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END), 1) as "Avg Gen Speed (tok/s)", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END), 0) as "Avg Prompt Speed (tok/s)", ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.total_duration') AS REAL) / 1e9), 1) as "Avg Total Duration (s)" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND model_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model_id ORDER BY SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Responses", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as "Input Tokens", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as "Output Tokens", SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.total_tokens')) as "Total Tokens", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END), 1) as "Avg Gen Speed (tok/s)", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(usage, '$.prompt_eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END), 0) as "Avg Prompt Speed (tok/s)", ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(usage, '$.total_duration') AS REAL) / 1e9), 1) as "Avg Total Duration (s)" FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND usage IS NOT NULL AND usage != 'null' AND model_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model_id ORDER BY SUM(json_extract(usage, '$.completion_tokens')) DESC

panels.title: Per User + Model Token Stats
panels.description: Filtered by User and Model dropdowns above

targets.queryText: SELECT u.name as "User", cm.model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Responses", SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as "Input Tokens", SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as "Output Tokens", SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.total_tokens')) as "Total Tokens", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END), 1) as "Avg Gen Speed (tok/s)", ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.total_duration') AS REAL) / 1e9), 1) as "Avg Total Duration (s)" FROM chat_message cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' AND cm.usage IS NOT NULL AND cm.usage != 'null' AND cm.model_id IS NOT NULL AND u.name IN (${user_name:singlequote}) AND cm.model_id IN (${model_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY u.name, cm.model_id ORDER BY SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.completion_tokens')) DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT u.name as "User", cm.model_id as "Model", COUNT(*) as "Responses", SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.prompt_tokens')) as "Input Tokens", SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as "Output Tokens", SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.total_tokens')) as "Total Tokens", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END), 1) as "Avg Gen Speed (tok/s)", ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.total_duration') AS REAL) / 1e9), 1) as "Avg Total Duration (s)" FROM chat_message cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' AND cm.usage IS NOT NULL AND cm.usage != 'null' AND cm.model_id IS NOT NULL AND u.name IN (${user_name:singlequote}) AND cm.model_id IN (${model_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY u.name, cm.model_id ORDER BY SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.completion_tokens')) DESC

panels.title: Output Tokens per Day by User+Model

targets.queryText: SELECT (cm.created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, u.name || ' / ' || cm.model_id as metric, SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' AND cm.usage IS NOT NULL AND cm.usage != 'null' AND cm.model_id IS NOT NULL AND u.name IN (${user_name:singlequote}) AND cm.model_id IN (${model_id:singlequote}) AND cm.created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY cm.created_at / 86400, u.name, cm.model_id ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (cm.created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, u.name || ' / ' || cm.model_id as metric, SUM(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.completion_tokens')) as value FROM chat_message cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' AND cm.usage IS NOT NULL AND cm.usage != 'null' AND cm.model_id IS NOT NULL AND u.name IN (${user_name:singlequote}) AND cm.model_id IN (${model_id:singlequote}) AND cm.created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY cm.created_at / 86400, u.name, cm.model_id ORDER BY time

panels.title: Generation Speed per Day by Model

targets.queryText: SELECT (cm.created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, cm.model_id as metric, AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END) as value FROM chat_message cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' AND cm.usage IS NOT NULL AND cm.usage != 'null' AND cm.model_id IS NOT NULL AND u.name IN (${user_name:singlequote}) AND cm.model_id IN (${model_id:singlequote}) AND cm.created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY cm.created_at / 86400, cm.model_id ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (cm.created_at / 86400 * 86400) as time, cm.model_id as metric, AVG(CASE WHEN json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') > 0 AND json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') > 0 THEN CAST(json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_count') AS REAL) / json_extract(cm.usage, '$.eval_duration') * 1e9 ELSE NULL END) as value FROM chat_message cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.role = 'assistant' AND cm.usage IS NOT NULL AND cm.usage != 'null' AND cm.model_id IS NOT NULL AND u.name IN (${user_name:singlequote}) AND cm.model_id IN (${model_id:singlequote}) AND cm.created_at >= strftime('%s', 'now', '-90 days') GROUP BY cm.created_at / 86400, cm.model_id ORDER BY time

targets.queryText: SELECT c.title as "Title", u.name as "User", c.created_at * 1000 as "Created", c.updated_at * 1000 as "Updated", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.chat_id = c.id AND cm.role = 'assistant') as "Messages", (SELECT cm2.model_id FROM chat_message cm2 WHERE cm2.chat_id = c.id AND cm2.role = 'assistant' ORDER BY cm2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) as "Last Model" FROM chat c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.archived = 0 ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC LIMIT 30
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT c.title as "Title", u.name as "User", c.created_at * 1000 as "Created", c.updated_at * 1000 as "Updated", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.chat_id = c.id AND cm.role = 'assistant') as "Messages", (SELECT cm2.model_id FROM chat_message cm2 WHERE cm2.chat_id = c.id AND cm2.role = 'assistant' ORDER BY cm2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) as "Last Model" FROM chat c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.archived = 0 ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC LIMIT 30
